'''hangaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qindar|qindar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qindar|qindar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hangaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængæjæth|hængæjæth]] || [[word:hængæjæj|hængæjæj]] || [[word:hængæjæsh|hængæjæsh]] || [[word:hængæjæ|hængæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangangajath|hangangajath]] || [[word:hangangajaj|hangangajaj]] || [[word:hangangajash|hangangajash]] || [[word:hangangaja|hangangaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangajath|hangajath]] || [[word:hangajaj|hangajaj]] || [[word:hangajash|hangajash]] || [[word:hangaja|hangaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangafjath|hangafjath]] || [[word:hangafjaj|hangafjaj]] || [[word:hangafjash|hangafjash]] || [[word:hangafjaf|hangafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hangajatha|hangajatha]] || [[word:hangajaja|hangajaja]] || [[word:hangajasha|hangajasha]] || [[word:hangajaka|hangajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hangajath|hangajath]] || [[word:hangajaj|hangajaj]] || [[word:hangajash|hangajash]] || [[word:hangaja|hangaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hangajathal|hangajathal]] || [[word:hangajajal|hangajajal]] || [[word:hangajashal|hangajashal]] || [[word:hangajakal|hangajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hangajathatha|hangajathatha]] || [[word:hangajajaja|hangajajaja]] || [[word:hangajashasha|hangajashasha]] || [[word:hangajaka|hangajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hangajathan|hangajathan]] || [[word:hangajajan|hangajajan]] || [[word:hangajashan|hangajashan]] || [[word:hangajakan|hangajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hangajathaoro|hangajathaoro]] || [[word:hangajajaoro|hangajajaoro]] || [[word:hangajashaoro|hangajashaoro]] || [[word:hangajakaoro|hangajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
